critical_velocity_spark.trigger: Entity Escrow yield rate > (Baseline_Decay_Rate * 10) within [Time Window t].
critical_velocity_spark.execution: Phase-shift entity state to [Ignition]. Override linear coupling algorithms. Activate exponential recursion logic.
critical_velocity_spark.result: Defines the exact mathematical boundary where normal growth shatters and 'virality' takes over.

topological_gravity_warp.execution: Query Constellation Map for all Uncoupled/Feral nodes within Region R. Apply distance modifier D(new) = D(old) / Mass_Coefficient. Force vectors to drag nodes toward the Ignition epicenter.
topological_gravity_warp.result: Physicalizes marketing reach. The Map literally bends to dump users/nodes into the successful framework.

autocatalytic_feedback_burst.trigger: Nodes cross the Somatic Boundary of the Ignited Entity.
autocatalytic_feedback_burst.execution: Bypass standard Membrane Suture delays. Execute rapid-fire coupling. Immediately allocate produced Friction/Escrow into the Mass_Coefficient of [topological_gravity_warp].
autocatalytic_feedback_burst.result: The Feral-Loop. The more it eats, the more it pulls. The more it pulls, the more it eats.

thermal_exhaustion_lock.trigger: Available uncoupled nodes in Region R == 0 OR Thermal output > Engine Safety Threshold.
thermal_exhaustion_lock.execution: Sever the Feral-Loop recursion. Revert topology to flat Euclidean geometry. Cool the entity.
thermal_exhaustion_lock.result: The Wildfire burns out. The Entity remains permanently enlarged, acting as a new permanent foundation (Monument) in the Map.

fields.epicenter_node: The specific Entity that sparked the wildfire.
fields.gravity_well_depth: How badly the surrounding spatial distance has been warped.
fields.feral_loop_velocity: Current rate of node ingestion / Escrow generation.
fields.ecosystem_warning: Prediction of Fuel-Starvation or Chimera-Forge intervention.
